---
title: ""
pagetitle: "CV | Deon Roos"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---


```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Timeline card ─────────────────────────────────── */
.cv-timeline-card {
  background: #2a2b2d;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.75rem 1.5rem 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  border: 1px solid #3a3b3d;
}
.cv-tl-heading {
  color: #aaa;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  margin: 0 0 1.4rem;
}
/* ── Scroll wrapper ─────────────────────────────────── */
.cv-tl-scroll { overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.cv-tl-inner  { min-width: 700px; }

/* ── Rows ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cv-tl-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 3px;
}
.cv-tl-row-label {
  width: 88px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: #555;
  text-align: right;
  padding-right: 14px;
  user-select: none;
}

/* ── Bar track ──────────────────────────────────────── */
.cv-tl-track {
  flex: 1;
  position: relative;
}

/* ── Bars ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cv-tl-bar {
  position: absolute;
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  white-space: nowrap;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  transition: filter 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
}
.cv-tl-bar:hover {
  filter: brightness(1.22);
  transform: scaleY(1.08);
  z-index: 5;
}
.cv-tl-bar-text  { flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.cv-tl-bar-arrow { flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: 5px; opacity: 0.7; }

.cv-tl-bar-edu  { background: #a06a0c; }
.cv-tl-bar-emp  { background: #00a68a; }
.cv-tl-bar-pres { background: linear-gradient(to right, #00a68a 70%, #006e5c); }

/* ── Axis ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cv-tl-axis-row { margin: 1px 0 1px; }
.cv-tl-axis-track {
  flex: 1;
  position: relative;
  height: 28px;
}
.cv-tl-axis-line {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 1px;
  background: #404244;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
}
.cv-tl-tick {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
}
.cv-tl-tick-mark { width: 1px; height: 8px; background: #484a4d; }
.cv-tl-tick-lbl  { font-size: 0.58rem; color: #555; margin-top: 2px; white-space: nowrap; }
.cv-tl-tick-now .cv-tl-tick-mark { background: #00a68a; height: 10px; }
.cv-tl-tick-now .cv-tl-tick-lbl  { color: #00a68a; font-weight: 700; }

/* ── Modal backdrop ─────────────────────────────────── */
.cv-tl-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.62);
  z-index: 9999;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  backdrop-filter: blur(3px);
}
/* ── Modal box ──────────────────────────────────────── */
.cv-tl-modal {
  background: #1e1f21;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 1.75rem 2rem 1.5rem;
  max-width: 420px;
  width: 90vw;
  position: relative;
  border: 1px solid #333;
  box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
  animation: cvTlIn 0.18s ease;
}
@keyframes cvTlIn {
  from { opacity:0; transform: scale(0.93) translateY(10px); }
  to   { opacity:1; transform: scale(1)    translateY(0);    }
}
.cv-tl-mclose {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0.9rem; right: 0.9rem;
  background: none; border: none;
  color: #555; font-size: 1.4rem;
  cursor: pointer; line-height: 1;
  padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 4px;
  transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
}
.cv-tl-mclose:hover { color: #ccc; background: #2a2b2d; }

/* ── Modal content ──────────────────────────────────── */
.cv-tl-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
}
.cv-tl-badge-edu {
  background: rgba(160,106,12,0.2);
  color: #c48010;
  border: 1px solid rgba(160,106,12,0.38);
}
.cv-tl-badge-emp {
  background: rgba(0,166,138,0.15);
  color: #00a68a;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,166,138,0.3);
}
.cv-tl-modal h3 {
  color: #f0f0f0; font-size: 1.08rem; font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 0.25rem; line-height: 1.3;
}
.cv-tl-morg   { color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
.cv-tl-mdates { color: #555; font-size: 0.76rem; font-style: italic; }
hr.cv-tl-mdivider { border: none; border-top: 1px solid #2a2c2f; margin: 0.9rem 0; }
.cv-tl-mbullets {
  list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0;
}
.cv-tl-mbullets li {
  padding: 0.35rem 0 0.35rem 1.1rem;
  position: relative;
  color: #b8b8b8;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
}
.cv-tl-mbullets li + li { border-top: 1px solid #282929; }
.cv-tl-mbullets li::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0.72rem;
  width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%;
}
.cv-tl-mbullets-edu li::before { background: #a06a0c; }
.cv-tl-mbullets a { color: #00a68a; text-decoration: none; }
.cv-tl-mbullets a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
</style>

<div class="cv-timeline-card">
  <p class="cv-tl-heading">Career at a Glance</p>
  <div class="cv-tl-scroll">
    <div class="cv-tl-inner" id="cvTlInner"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  var VS = 2012.0;
  var VE = 2026 + 3 / 12;  /* ~Apr 2026 */
  var SP = VE - VS;

  function yr(y, m) { return y + (m - 1) / 12; }
  function pct(d)   { return ((d - VS) / SP * 100).toFixed(3); }
  function wpct(s, e) { return ((e - s) / SP * 100).toFixed(3); }

  /* ── Data ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  var items = [
    /* Education */
    { id:0, type:'edu',
      label:'BSc Zoology', title:'BSc (Hons) Zoology',
      org:'University of Aberdeen', loc:'Aberdeen, Scotland',
      start:yr(2012,9), end:yr(2016,6),
      dateStr:'September 2012 – June 2016',
      bullets:['Thesis: <a href="./theses/DeonRoos_2015.pdf" target="_blank">Water vole ecosystem engineering</a>.'] },

    { id:1, type:'edu',
      label:'PhD Ecology', title:'PhD Ecology',
      org:'University of Aberdeen', loc:'Aberdeen, Scotland',
      start:yr(2016,9), end:yr(2021,6),
      dateStr:'September 2016 – June 2021',
      bullets:['Publications: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.agee.2018.11.013" target="_blank">Roos et al. (2019)</a> and <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/ele.14074" target="_blank">Roos et al. (2022)</a>.'] },

    /* Employment */
    { id:2, type:'emp',
      label:'Research & Teaching', title:'Research & Teaching Fellow',
      org:'University of Aberdeen', loc:'Aberdeen, Scotland',
      start:yr(2020,12), end:yr(2022,5),
      dateStr:'December 2020 – May 2022',
      bullets:[] },

    { id:4, type:'emp',
      label:'Sr. Stat. Ecologist', title:'Senior Statistical Ecologist',
      org:'Animal & Plant Health Agency', loc:'Sand Hutton, England',
      start:yr(2022,5), end:yr(2024,1),
      dateStr:'May 2022 – January 2024',
      bullets:[] },

    { id:5, type:'emp', present:true,
      label:'Lecturer', title:'Lecturer in Applied Statistics',
      org:'University of Aberdeen', loc:'Aberdeen, Scotland',
      start:yr(2024,1), end:null,
      dateStr:'January 2024 – Present',
      bullets:[] }
  ];

  var TICKS = [2012, 2014, 2016, 2018, 2020, 2022, 2024];

  /* ── Slot assignment (greedy interval colouring) ──── */
  function assignSlots(group) {
    var sorted = group.slice().sort(function(a, b) { return a.start - b.start; });
    var slotEnds = [];
    sorted.forEach(function(item) {
      var end = item.end !== null ? item.end : VE;
      var slot = 0;
      while (slotEnds[slot] !== undefined && slotEnds[slot] > item.start + 0.001) {
        slot++;
      }
      item._slot = slot;
      slotEnds[slot] = end;
    });
    return slotEnds.length;
  }

  /* ── Bar geometry ─────────────────────────────────── */
  var SINGLE = { trackH: 46, barH: 32, baseTop: 7, gap: 0,  fs: '0.68rem', pad: '0 9px' };
  var DOUBLE = { trackH: 54, barH: 21, baseTop: 4, gap: 4,  fs: '0.60rem', pad: '0 6px' };

  function barHtml(item, cfg) {
    var l = pct(item.start);
    var isPresent = item.end === null;
    var slot = item._slot || 0;
    var top  = cfg.baseTop + slot * (cfg.barH + cfg.gap);
    var commonStyle = 'top:' + top + 'px;height:' + cfg.barH + 'px;padding:' + cfg.pad + ';font-size:' + cfg.fs + ';';
    var style, barCls;

    if (isPresent) {
      style  = 'left:' + l + '%;right:0;' + commonStyle;
      barCls = 'cv-tl-bar cv-tl-bar-pres';
    } else {
      var w = wpct(item.start, item.end);
      style  = 'left:' + l + '%;width:' + w + '%;' + commonStyle;
      barCls = 'cv-tl-bar ' + (item.type === 'edu' ? 'cv-tl-bar-edu' : 'cv-tl-bar-emp');
    }

    var wNum = isPresent
      ? (VE - item.start) / SP * 100
      : parseFloat(wpct(item.start, item.end));
    var textSpan = wNum > 4
      ? '<span class="cv-tl-bar-text">' + item.label + '</span>'
      : '';
    var arrow = isPresent
      ? '<span class="cv-tl-bar-arrow" style="font-size:' + (parseFloat(cfg.fs) * 1.2) + 'rem">&#8594;</span>'
      : '';

    return '<div class="' + barCls + '" style="' + style + '" ' +
           'title="' + item.title + '" data-tl="' + item.id + '">' +
           textSpan + arrow + '</div>';
  }

  function trackHtml(group, cfg) {
    return '<div class="cv-tl-track" style="height:' + cfg.trackH + 'px;">' +
      group.map(function(item) { return barHtml(item, cfg); }).join('') +
    '</div>';
  }

  function rowHtml(label, group, cfg) {
    return '<div class="cv-tl-row">' +
      '<div class="cv-tl-row-label">' + label + '</div>' +
      trackHtml(group, cfg) +
    '</div>';
  }

  function axisHtml() {
    var ticks = TICKS.map(function(y) {
      return '<div class="cv-tl-tick" style="left:' + pct(y) + '%">' +
        '<div class="cv-tl-tick-mark"></div>' +
        '<div class="cv-tl-tick-lbl">' + y + '</div>' +
      '</div>';
    }).join('');
    var nowTick =
      '<div class="cv-tl-tick cv-tl-tick-now" style="left:99%;transform:translate(-100%,-50%)">' +
        '<div class="cv-tl-tick-mark"></div>' +
        '<div class="cv-tl-tick-lbl">Now</div>' +
      '</div>';
    return '<div class="cv-tl-row cv-tl-axis-row">' +
      '<div class="cv-tl-row-label"></div>' +
      '<div class="cv-tl-axis-track">' +
        '<div class="cv-tl-axis-line"></div>' +
        ticks + nowTick +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>';
  }

  /* ── Render ───────────────────────────────────────── */
  var inner = document.getElementById('cvTlInner');
  if (!inner) return;

  var edu = items.filter(function(i) { return i.type === 'edu'; });
  var emp = items.filter(function(i) { return i.type === 'emp'; });

  var eduSlots = assignSlots(edu);
  var empSlots = assignSlots(emp);
  var eduCfg   = eduSlots > 1 ? DOUBLE : SINGLE;
  var empCfg   = empSlots > 1 ? DOUBLE : SINGLE;

  inner.innerHTML =
    rowHtml('Education', edu, eduCfg) +
    axisHtml() +
    rowHtml('Employment', emp, empCfg);

  /* ── Modal ────────────────────────────────────────── */
  var bd = document.createElement('div');
  bd.className     = 'cv-tl-backdrop';
  bd.style.display = 'none';
  bd.innerHTML =
    '<div class="cv-tl-modal">' +
      '<button class="cv-tl-mclose" aria-label="Close">&times;</button>' +
      '<div id="cvTlMBody"></div>' +
    '</div>';
  document.body.appendChild(bd);

  var mbody  = bd.querySelector('#cvTlMBody');
  var mclose = bd.querySelector('.cv-tl-mclose');

  function openModal(item) {
    var isEdu = item.type === 'edu';
    var bCls  = isEdu ? 'cv-tl-badge-edu' : 'cv-tl-badge-emp';
    var bText = isEdu ? 'Education'        : 'Employment';
    var ulCls = isEdu ? 'cv-tl-mbullets-edu' : 'cv-tl-mbullets-emp';

    var bulletHtml = '';
    if (item.bullets && item.bullets.length > 0) {
      var lis = item.bullets.map(function(b) { return '<li>' + b + '</li>'; }).join('');
      bulletHtml = '<hr class="cv-tl-mdivider"><ul class="cv-tl-mbullets ' + ulCls + '">' + lis + '</ul>';
    }

    mbody.innerHTML =
      '<span class="cv-tl-badge ' + bCls + '">' + bText + '</span>' +
      '<h3>' + item.title + '</h3>' +
      '<div class="cv-tl-morg">' + item.org + ' &middot; ' + item.loc + '</div>' +
      '<div class="cv-tl-mdates">' + item.dateStr + '</div>' +
      bulletHtml;

    bd.style.display = 'flex';
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }

  function closeModal() {
    bd.style.display = 'none';
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  mclose.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
  bd.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === bd) closeModal(); });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeModal(); });

  inner.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    var el = e.target;
    while (el && el !== inner) {
      if (el.dataset && el.dataset.tl !== undefined) {
        var id   = parseInt(el.dataset.tl, 10);
        var item = items.filter(function(i) { return i.id === id; })[0];
        if (item) openModal(item);
        return;
      }
      el = el.parentElement;
    }
  });

})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<section class="cv-sections-grid">
  <a href="cv-employment.qmd" class="course-card">
    <h3>Employment</h3>
    <p>Work history across academia and statistical roles.</p>
  </a>

  <a href="cv-education.qmd" class="course-card">
    <h3>Education</h3>
    <p>Formal degrees and institutions attended.</p>
  </a>

  <a href="cv-awards.qmd" class="course-card">
    <h3>Awards &amp; Funding</h3>
    <p>Recognition and research funding received.</p>
  </a>

  <a href="cv-skills.qmd" class="course-card">
    <h3>Skills</h3>
    <p>Technical, statistical, and communication expertise.</p>
  </a>
</section>
```
